/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -O3 -DNDEBUG --generate-code=arch=compute_90,code=[compute_90,sm_90] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/run.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run.dir/kernel.cu.o -o CMakeFiles/run.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs   -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda/lib64"
